properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: … There’s a time in your life, you want to give up There's a moment you think nobody cares There’s a time in your life when things are black and white But in every moment God understands

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: … He is there in times of trouble He is there in times of need He is there today and tomorrow He is there, He is there

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: … There’s a time in your life when the world stop turning There’s a moment the sun seemed didn’t shine There’s a time of sadness, there’s a time of grief But in every moment God is in control

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: … He is there, He is there
